LanguageData.Ammo_CryptoRifle.label: crypto rifle cartridge
LanguageData.Ammo_CryptoRifle.description: Metal-cored projectiles wrapped in unstable crypto technology contained with an energy field. Capable of dealing both ballistic damage and causing serious hypothermia.
LanguageData.Ammo_CryptoPistol.label: crypto pistol cartridge
LanguageData.Ammo_CryptoPistol.description: Metal-cored projectiles wrapped in unstable crypto technology contained with an energy field. Capable of dealing both ballistic damage and causing serious hypothermia.
LanguageData.Ammo_CryptoShotgun.label: crypto bolt
LanguageData.Ammo_CryptoShotgun.description: Metal-cored projectiles wrapped in unstable crypto technology contained with an energy field. Capable of dealing both ballistic damage and causing serious hypothermia.
LanguageData.Bullet_CryptoRifle.label: crypto bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_CryptoPistol.label: crypto bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_CryptoShotgun.label: crypto pellet
